rationale: Educ. Code §12.2565 governs the charter application process for adult education programs. It bears no relation to residence homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The commissioner shall accept applications for a charter to operate an adult education program under this subchapter during the 60-day period beginning on September 1 of each year.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions; no overlap in subject matter.
